name: Still Drone
description: Unchanging low drone maintaining constant presence

prompts.label: unchanging low drone maintaining constant quiet presence
prompts.text: unchanging low drone maintaining constant quiet presence, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay

prompts.label: flat bass tone existing without variation or movement
prompts.text: flat bass tone existing without variation or movement, tape-saturated warmth, granular piano cloud, candlelight flickering softly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, smooth fade out

prompts.label: steady sub-frequency providing foundation of stillness
prompts.text: steady sub-frequency providing foundation of stillness, Brian Eno infinite space, reversed cymbal swell, underwater weightlessness, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, sustained resonance

prompts.label: earth hum resonating at fundamental standing frequency
prompts.text: earth hum resonating at fundamental standing frequency, abandoned hall echo, harmonium drone with tape wobble, drifting between sleep and waking, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, with natural decay

prompts.label: power grid baseline drone beneath the threshold of attention
prompts.text: power grid baseline drone beneath the threshold of attention, lo-fi cassette hiss and bloom, shimmer reverb pad wash, moonlight through frosted glass, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, smooth fade out
